keyPoints: Adaptable: Agile process adapts to change.
Individuals and Interactions: Focus on people and collaboration.
Working Software: Continuously deliver working software.
Customer Collaboration: Involve customers in the process.
Responding to Change: Be prepared to adjust the plan.
Extreme Programming (XP): Focus on technical practices for better quality.
Iterative and Incremental: Break down work into small cycles.
Other Agile Process Models: Include Crystal, Scrum, Kanban, etc.
Tool Set for Agile Process: Include Jira, Trello, Asana, etc.
